config.title: Zarządzanie wydrukiem
config.script:
#include "50203"
sub setup_picture(byref pPicture,byval bOn) if bOn then pPicture.image = clng(PICID_DRUKUJ) pPicture.tip = "Drukuj tę stronę" pPicture.parent.backcolor = rgb(255,255,255) else pPicture.image = clng(PICID_NIEDRUKUJ) pPicture.tip = "Nie drukuj tej strony" pPicture.parent.backcolor = rgb(224,224,224) end if end sub
const PSIW_PRINT = 1 const PSIW_SKIP = 2 const PSIW_CANCEL = 3
class cstd_print_sink_info private m_pPage private m_nXPage private m_nYPage
private sub class_initialize() set m_pPage = nothing end sub private sub class_terminate() 'OK set m_pPage = nothing end sub public function on_start_printing_document(title,nXPages,nYPages) set m_pPage = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=THIS_FILE")
build_page m_pPage,title,nXPages,nYPages
doc_.pushpage m_pPage
if (m_pPage.domodal()) = 1 then m_pPage.set_notmodal on_start_printing_document = true else on_start_printing_document = false end if end function
public function on_start_printing_page(nXPage,nYPage) m_nXPage = nXPage m_nYPage = nYPage
dim nAnswer: nAnswer = m_pPage.update_info_befprint(nXPage,nYPage)
on_start_printing_page = nAnswer end function
public sub on_end_printing_page m_pPage.update_info_aftprint m_nXPage,m_nYPage end sub
public sub on_end_printing_document doc_.poppage end sub '------------------- private sub build_page(pDestPage,title,nXPages,nYPages) dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pDestPage.ctrl(CTRLID_SHEETDISPLAY)) dim nX,nY
'header row pTB.newrow pTB.newcell
for nX = 1 to nXPages pTB.newcell with pTB.cell .width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE) .align = ALIGN_CENTER .addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = cstr(nX) end with next
for nY = 1 to nYPages pTB.newrow pTB.newcell with pTB.cell .width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE) .align = ALIGN_RIGHT .addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).text = cstr(nY) end with
for nX = 1 to nXPages pTB.newcell pTB.cell.width = clng(MINIMIZE_SIZE) dim pPic : set pPic = pTB.cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE,picid_for_page(nX,nY) ) set pPic.hli = doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='btnSelect' vn1='" + cstr(nY) + "' vn2='"+ cstr(nX) + "'") setup_picture pPic,true next next pDestPage.ctrl(CTRLID_TITLE).text = title end sub end class '--------------------------------------------- function new_print_sink_info() dim bCreate : bCreate = true
if trans_.isvar(GVAR_AUTOPRINT) then if trans_.var(GVAR_AUTOPRINT) = 1 then bCreate = false end if end if
if bCreate then set new_print_sink_info = new cstd_print_sink_info else set new_print_sink_info = nothing end if
end function
'--------------------------------------------- dim bCancel : bCancel = false dim bModeModal : bModeModal = true
sub set_notmodal() bModeModal = false end sub
function update_info_befprint(nX,nY) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PROGRESS_MSG).text = "Drukowanie " + cstr(nX) + "-" + cstr(nY)
if bCancel then update_info_befprint = PSIW_CANCEL else if page_.ctrl(picid_for_page(nX,nY)).image = clng(PICID_DRUKUJ) then update_info_befprint = PSIW_PRINT else update_info_befprint = PSIW_SKIP end if end if page_.updateview end function
function update_info_aftprint(nX,nY) with page_.ctrl(picid_for_page(nX,nY)) if .image = clng(PICID_DRUKUJ) then .image = PICID_WYDRUKOWANO end if set .hli = nothing .disable = true end with end function
function picid_for_page(nX,nY) picid_for_page = CTRLID_FIRST_PICTURE + nY * 20 + nX end function '--------------------------------------------- function btnSelect(byref pHLI) dim nY : nY = pHLI(1) dim nX : nX = pHLI(2) dim pPicture : set pPicture = page_.ctrl(pHLI(PROPC_CONTROL))
setup_picture pPicture, (pPicture.image <> clng(PICID_DRUKUJ)) end function
'+3 - select '+2 - unselect '+1 - invert
function change_selection(byval nMode) dim pTable : set pTable = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_SHEETDISPLAY) dim pBody : set pBody = pTable.body dim pRow dim pCell dim pPicture for each pRow in pBody for each pCell in pRow for each pPicture in pCell if pPicture.type = CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE then select case nMode case 3 setup_picture pPicture,true case 2 setup_picture pPicture,false case 1 setup_picture pPicture,(pPicture.image <> clng(PICID_DRUKUJ)) end select end if next next next page_.updateview end function
function btnSelectAll change_selection 3 end function
function btnSelectNone change_selection 2 end function
function btnSelectInvert change_selection 1 end function '---------------------------------------------
function btnOK page_.ctrl(CTRLID_OK).disable = true page_.result= 1 page_.goback end function
function btnCancel page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PROGRESS_MSG).text = "Przerywanie wydruku..." page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CANCEL).disable = true page_.updateview
bCancel = true page_.result= 0 if bModeModal then page_.goback end if end function
function fopen() fopen = true page_.cmdenabled(CMD_PRINT) = false page_.cmdenabled(CMD_PRINTPREVIEW) = false end function
function get_my_default_printer() dim strDevice : strDevice = "DEFAULT" dim pMyDefaultPrinter: set pMyDefaultPrinter = getuserprofileObj(1097) '1097 = USERPROF_MY_DEFAULT_PRINTER
if not pMyDefaultPrinter is nothing then if pMyDefaultPrinter.Wartosc <> "" then strDevice = pMyDefaultPrinter.Wartosc if strDevice = "?" then strDevice = "" end if end if end if
'trans_.message 0,0, "Drukarka domyślna to: " + strDevice
get_my_default_printer = strDevice
end function
